title: Iceberg table format not respected on insert?
description:
### Describe the bug
I inserted into a Iceberg ORC file, then I inserted into it without specifying the format. Should the ORC format still be used?
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int NULL, c1 Float32, c2 Nullable(Int)) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/', format = 'ORC');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0, c2, c1) SELECT c0, c2, c1 FROM generateRandom('c0 Int, c2 Nullable(Int), c1 Float32', 3383666773907720033, 1739, 2) LIMIT 25;
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION icebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/', structure = 'c2 Nullable(Int), c0 Int NULL, c1 Float32') (c0, c2, c1) SELECT c0, c2, c1 FROM generateRandom('c0 Int, c2 Nullable(Int), c1 Float32', 5937433907698249414, 1783, 5) LIMIT 60;
SELECT c2 FROM t0; --DB::Exception: orc::ParseError: Not an ORC file
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stak trace:
```

5. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/NativeORCBlockInputFormat.cpp:826: DB::getFileReader(DB::ReadBuffer&, std::unique_ptr<orc::Reader, std::default_delete<orc::Reader>>&, orc::MemoryPool&, DB::FormatSettings const&, bool, unsigned long, std::atomic<int>&) @ 0x000000001f3283cc
6. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/NativeORCBlockInputFormat.cpp:983: DB::NativeORCBlockInputFormat::prepareFileReader() @ 0x000000001f327ea0
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), age TINYINT, salary DOUBLE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, age, salary) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30, 70000.50);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, age, salary) SELECT number, CONCAT('User', number), number % 100, number * 1000.0 FROM generate_series(0, 9) AS number;
CREATE TABLE t2 (product_id INT, product_name VARCHAR(255), price FLOAT, stock INT);

INSERT INTO t2 (product_id, product_name, price, stock) SELECT id, name, price, NULL FROM (SELECT number AS id, CONCAT('Product', number) AS name, number * 10.5 AS price FROM generate_series(0, 4) AS number);
key_bug_features: Inserting without format leads to ORC parse error
